popularStory.headline: BIO
popularStory.description:
BIO:  from http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/LUXEMBOURG.htm#WaleranLignydied1288A as of 4/14/2016

PHILIPPINE de Luxembourg ([1252]-6 Apr 1311).  The Chronologia Johannes de Beke records the marriage of …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Philippa de Luxembourg於1252年6月28日出生在比利時納姆爾時，她的父親Henri de Luxembourg V36歲，母親Marguerite de Bar32歲。她於大約1270年與Jean comte de Hainaut et de Hollande I結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1311年4月6日在法國豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德瓦倫希恩斯享年58歲，埋葬在法國豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德瓦倫希恩斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philippa de Luxembourg于1252年6月28日出生在比利时納姆爾时，她的父亲Henri de Luxembourg V36岁，母亲Marguerite de Bar32岁。她于大约1270年与Jean comte de Hainaut et de Hollande I结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1311年4月6日在法国豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德瓦倫希恩斯享年58岁，埋葬在法国豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德瓦倫希恩斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Philippa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Philip . In England during the Middle Ages the vernacular name Philip was borne by women as well as men, but female bearers were distinguished in Latin records by this form. It was not, however, used as a regular given name until the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Philippa de Luxembourg was born on 28 June 1252, in Namur, Belgium, her father, Henri de Luxembourg V, was 36 and her mother, Marguerite de Bar, was 32. She married Jean comte de Hainaut et de Hollande I about 1270. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 6 April 1311, in Valenciennes, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 58, and was buried in Valenciennes, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philippa de Luxembourg est née le 28 juin 1252, à Namur, Belgique, son père, Henri de Luxembourg V, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Marguerite de Bar, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Jean comte de Hainaut et de Hollande I environ 1270. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 6 avril 1311, à Valenciennes, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Valenciennes, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Philippa de Luxembourg am 28. Juni 1252 in Namen, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henri de Luxembourg V 36 und ihre Mutter Marguerite de Bar 32. Sie hat um 1270 Jean comte de Hainaut et de Hollande I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. April 1311 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Valenciennes, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Valenciennes, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philippa de Luxembourg è nata il il 28 giugno 1252 nel Namur, Belgio, sua padre, Henri de Luxembourg V, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Marguerite de Bar, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Jean comte de Hainaut et de Hollande I circa 1270. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 6 aprile 1311, nel Valenciennes, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolta a Valenciennes, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Philippa de Luxembourgが1252年6月28日にベルギーナムルで生まれた時，父Henri de Luxembourg Vは36歳，母Marguerite de Barは32歳であった。約1270年にJean comte de Hainaut et de Hollande Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1311年4月6日にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスノードベレンシエンスで58歳で死去し，フランスハウトス-デ-フランスノードベレンシエンスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Philippa de Luxembourg(이)가 1252년 6월 28일 벨기에 남어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henri de Luxembourg V(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marguerite de Bar(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 대략 1270년 Jean comte de Hainaut et de Hollande I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1311년 4월 6일 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 노르드 발시네스에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 노르드 발시네스에 묻혔다.

mn.28 June 1252–6 APR 1311: 1252 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 28–1311 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 6

pt.28 June 1252–6 APR 1311: 28 de junho de 1252–6 de abril de 1311
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philippa de Luxembourg nasceu em 28 de junho de 1252, em Namur, Bélgica, seu pai, Henri de Luxembourg V, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite de Bar, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Jean comte de Hainaut et de Hollande I aproximadamente 1270. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 6 de abril de 1311, em Valenciennes, Nord, Hauts-de-France, França, com 58 anos, e foi sepultada em Valenciennes, Nord, Hauts-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philippa de Luxembourg родилась 28 июня 1252 г. в местности намур, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Henri de Luxembourg V было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Marguerite de Bar, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jean comte de Hainaut et de Hollande I около 1270 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 6 апреля 1311 г. в местности веиленсиеннесь, норд, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности веиленсиеннесь, норд, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.28 June 1252–6 APR 1311: 28 de junio de 1252–6 de abril de 1311
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Philippa de Luxembourg nació el 28 de junio de 1252, en Namur, Bélgica, su papá, Henri de Luxembourg V, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Marguerite de Bar, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Jean comte de Hainaut et de Hollande I aproximadamente 1270. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 6 de abril de 1311, en Valenciennes, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultada en Valenciennes, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia.
